---
title: "IIIF Resources"
subtitle: "Viewers, collections, tools and documentation"
---

## Getting Started with IIIF

- **How IIIF Works** (official intro): [iiif.io/get-started/how-iiif-works/](https://iiif.io/get-started/how-iiif-works/)
- **IIIF Cookbook** (practical recipes with examples): [iiif.io/api/cookbook/](https://iiif.io/api/cookbook/)
- **IIIF Awesome list**: [github.com/IIIF/awesome-iiif](https://github.com/IIIF/awesome-iiif)

---

## API Specifications

- **Image API 3.0**: [iiif.io/api/image/3.0/](https://iiif.io/api/image/3.0/)
- **Presentation API 3.0**: [iiif.io/api/presentation/3.0/](https://iiif.io/api/presentation/3.0/)
- **Search API**: [iiif.io/api/search/](https://iiif.io/api/search/)
- **Authorization Flow API**: [iiif.io/api/auth/](https://iiif.io/api/auth/)

---

## IIIF-Enabled Collections

| Institution | URL |
|---|---|
| Europeana | [europeana.eu](https://europeana.eu) |
| Gallica (BnF) | [gallica.bnf.fr](https://gallica.bnf.fr) |
| Nakala (Huma-Num) | [nakala.fr](https://nakala.fr) |
| Wellcome Collection | [wellcomecollection.org](https://wellcomecollection.org) |
| British Library | [bl.uk](https://www.bl.uk/digitised-manuscripts/) |
| Harvard Art Museums | [harvardartmuseums.org](https://harvardartmuseums.org) |
| Bodleian Libraries | [digital.bodleian.ox.ac.uk](https://digital.bodleian.ox.ac.uk) |

---

## IIIF Viewers

- **Universal Viewer**: [universalviewer.io](https://universalviewer.io) — feature-rich, widely used
- **Mirador**: [projectmirador.org](https://projectmirador.org) — multi-window, annotation-ready
- **Clover IIIF**: [samvera-labs.github.io/clover-iiif](https://samvera-labs.github.io/clover-iiif/) — modern React viewer
- **IIIF.io Viewer**: [iiif.io/demos/](https://iiif.io/demos/) — list of all viewers

---

## Manifest Creation Tools

- **Manifest Editor** (online): [manifest-editor.iiif.io](https://manifest-editor.iiif.io)
- **Digirati Manifest Editor**: [github.com/digirati-co-uk/iiif-manifest-editor](https://github.com/digirati-co-uk/iiif-manifest-editor)
- **Tropy IIIF Export Plugin**: generates manifests from Tropy projects
